athlete_id.description: Target athlete; defaults to selected athlete in coach mode, or the only athlete otherwise. Format: i12345 or 12345.

include_full.description: When true, include raw upstream gear fields under each row's full object; default terse rows include gear_id, name/name_missing, type, brand, model, and retired.

refresh.description: When true, bypass the manual in-process per-athlete gear cache and fetch a fresh list from intervals.icu. Failed refreshes do not replace the last successful cache entry.
